title: Front Office Manager - Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group - Multiple Openings

jsonLd.title: Front Office Manager - Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group - Multiple Openings
jsonLd.description:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is actively seeking a talented and motivated Front Office Manager to join our dynamic team in Visakhapatnam. This is an excellent opportunity for professionals who are passionate about making a real impact in a fast-growing organization.

About Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group:
Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Coordinate with travel agents and OTAs for occupancy optimization
• Train and supervise front-line staff on service standards

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Relations
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Food Safety
• Proficiency in Crisis Management
• Proficiency in GDS Systems
• Proficiency in Revenue Management
• Proficiency in Travel Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Referral bonus program
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jungle Lodges Karnataka Global Group!
